name: S-4 --threshold exits one when overall coverage is below the bar per the gap analyzer gate
command:
printf -- '- id: a
  fetch_frequency: daily
- id: b
  fetch_frequency: daily
' > cat.yaml && mkdir -p tree/a && printf 'source:
  id: a
rules:
  - {id: r, provenance: [{source: a}]}
' > tree/a/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-audit.sh" --emit r.md --catalog cat.yaml --tree tree --threshold 90 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 1 ] && echo blocked 1>&2
